word: H7406 - רֶכֶס - rekeç - reh'-kes - Rough place

sections.paragraph:
Original: רכס

Transliteration: rekes

Phonetic: reh'-kes

BDB Definition:

  1. roughness or bound up, impeded, the impassable or mountain chain, rough place
    1. meaning dubious

Origin: from H7405

TWOT entry: 2166a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
